title: Binance Cascade/Regime Scientific Collaboration 15
thesis: Detect fragile market states and liquidation cascades early enough to survive and exploit dislocations. This variant fuses microstructure researcher guidance with control/rl researcher, information theory researcher to test order-book stress, queue pressure, and execution-quality asymmetry; feedback-aware thresholding and action policies that stay robust under execution drift; entropy compression, surprise detection, and cross-feed information gain.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
